PARAM.description: the string to test and possibly return
PARAM.name: string
PARAM.content: the string to test and possibly return

RETURN.description: Returns the given string if it is non-null; the empty string otherwise.
RETURN.content: Returns the given string if it is non-null; the empty string otherwise.

PARAM.description: the string to test and possibly return, not null
PARAM.name: string
PARAM.content: the string to test and possibly return

RETURN.description: Returns the given string if it is nonempty; null otherwise.
RETURN.content: Returns the given string if it is nonempty; null otherwise.

RETURN.description: true if the given string is null or is the empty string.
RETURN.content: true if the given string is null or is the empty string.

PARAM.description: the string which should appear at the end of the result
PARAM.name: string
PARAM.content: the string which should appear at the end of the result

PARAM.description: the minimum length the resulting string must have. Can be zero or negative, in which case the input string is always returned.
PARAM.name: minLength
PARAM.content: the minimum length the resulting string must have. Can be zero or negative, in which case the input string is always returned.

PARAM.description: the character to insert at the beginning of the result until the minimum length is reached
PARAM.name: padChar
PARAM.content: the character to insert at the beginning of the result until the minimum length is reached

RETURN.description: Returns a string, of length at least minLength, consisting of string prepended with as many copies of padChar as are necessary to reach that length.
RETURN.content: Returns a string, of length at least minLength, consisting of string prepended with as many copies of padChar as are necessary to reach that length.

PARAM.description: the string which should appear at the beginning of the result
PARAM.name: string
PARAM.content: the string which should appear at the beginning of the result

PARAM.description: the minimum length the resulting string must have. Can be zero or negative, in which case the input string is always returned.
PARAM.name: minLength
PARAM.content: the minimum length the resulting string must have. Can be zero or negative, in which case the input string is always returned.

PARAM.description: the character to append to the end of the result until the minimum length is reached
PARAM.name: padChar
PARAM.content: the character to append to the end of the result until the minimum length is reached

RETURN.description: Returns a string, of length at least minLength, consisting of string appended with as many copies of padChar as are necessary to reach that length.
RETURN.content: Returns a string, of length at least minLength, consisting of string appended with as many copies of padChar as are necessary to reach that length.

PARAM.description: the number of times to repeat it; a nonnegative integer
PARAM.name: count
PARAM.content: the number of times to repeat it; a nonnegative integer

RETURN.description: a string containing string repeated count times (the empty string if count is zero).
RETURN.content: a string containing string repeated count times (the empty string if count is zero).
